message:
Command `PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
# Find the padframe log - it's in a temp dir but the temp dir may be cleaned up
# Let's find any log.json from padframe-gen
find "$PROJECT_ROOT" -name "log.json" 2>/dev/null | head -5
# Also check if there's a partially generated design root
ls "$PROJECT_ROOT/" | grep -v "^ip\|^docs\|^config\|^verification\|^README"` executed with exit code 0.

# Also check if there's a partially generated design root
ls "$PROJECT_ROOT/" | grep -v "^ip\|^docs\|^config\|^verification\|^README""}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
# Find the padframe log - it's in a temp dir but the temp dir may be cleaned up
# Let's find any log.json from padframe-gen
find "$PROJECT_ROOT" -name "log.json" 2>/dev/null | head -5
# Also check if there's a partially generated design root
ls "$PROJECT_ROOT/" | grep -v "^ip\|^docs\|^config\|^verification\|^README"
